message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first ft web server orchestrator (tick 298)

Migrates the `ft web` CLI entry in main.rs to the cx-first orchestrator
`run_web_server_with_cx`:

- main.rs L31994: `frankenterm_core::web::run_web_server(config)` →
  `run_web_server_with_cx(&web_cx, config)` where `web_cx` resolves via
  `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`

**Export fix (web.rs L27):**

- Added `run_web_server_with_cx` to the public re-export list alongside
  `start_web_server_with_cx`. Previously only the partial-orchestrator
  `start_web_server_with_cx` was re-exported, which is why earlier work
  couldn't reach the full orchestrator cleanly.

The `_with_cx` orchestrator routes the initial bind through
`start_web_server_with_cx` and threads the caller's cx into
`wait_for_shutdown_signal_with_cx` so the signal wait can be interrupted
by cx-cancel as well as by Ctrl-C/SIGTERM. A caller-initiated cx-cancel
now triggers the same graceful-shutdown path (signal_shutdown +
poke_listener + drain join handle) that a SIGTERM would.

**Side effect**: baseline warning count drops from 7 → 5 since
`run_web_server_with_cx` and `wait_for_shutdown_signal_with_cx` are
no longer dead code.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
(5 warnings baseline, reduced from 7).

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 112 (187-298).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 193 sites (192 before + 1).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 58 (unchanged this tick; the export
  fix doesn't count as a migration site).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
